resources.description: Look up a single Twitter/X tweet by its numeric tweet ID. Returns full tweet data including text, author profile, creation date, engagement metrics (likes, retweets, replies, quotes, bookmarks), and referenced tweets. Query param: id (string, required) - numeric tweet ID, e.g. GET /tweets/by/id?id=1110302988. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.

accepts.description: Look up a single Twitter/X tweet by its numeric tweet ID. Returns full tweet data including text, author profile, creation date, engagement metrics (likes, retweets, replies, quotes, bookmarks), and referenced tweets. Query param: id (string, required) - numeric tweet ID, e.g. GET /tweets/by/id?id=1110302988. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.

resources.description: Email authentication validator. Checks SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records for a domain, parses mechanisms and policies, probes multiple DKIM selectors concurrently, detects misconfigurations (weak SPF qualifiers, short DKIM keys, lax DMARC policies), and returns an overall email security grade (A/B/C/D/F) with transparent deductions.

accepts.description: Email authentication validator. Checks SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records for a domain, parses mechanisms and policies, probes multiple DKIM selectors concurrently, detects misconfigurations (weak SPF qualifiers, short DKIM keys, lax DMARC policies), and returns an overall email security grade (A/B/C/D/F) with transparent deductions.

resources.description: HTTP security headers audit. Fetches a URL and evaluates 10 security-critical response headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-XSS-Protection, CORP, COEP, COOP), detects anti-patterns (info leakage via Server/X-Powered-By), and returns an overall security grade (A/B/C/D/F) with transparent deductions.

accepts.description: HTTP security headers audit. Fetches a URL and evaluates 10 security-critical response headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-XSS-Protection, CORP, COEP, COOP), detects anti-patterns (info leakage via Server/X-Powered-By), and returns an overall security grade (A/B/C/D/F) with transparent deductions.

resources.description: HTTP redirect chain tracer. Follows a URL through its full redirect chain (up to 20 hops) and returns structured hop-by-hop data including timing, status codes, response headers, TLS status, protocol downgrade detection, loop detection, and an overall redirect health grade (A/B/C/D/F).

accepts.description: HTTP redirect chain tracer. Follows a URL through its full redirect chain (up to 20 hops) and returns structured hop-by-hop data including timing, status codes, response headers, TLS status, protocol downgrade detection, loop detection, and an overall redirect health grade (A/B/C/D/F).

resources.description: IPv4/IPv6 subnet calculator and CIDR analysis. Accepts a single CIDR or comma-separated CIDRs. Returns network/broadcast addresses, netmask, wildcard mask, usable host range, binary/hex masks, supernet, possible subnets. For multiple CIDRs, detects overlaps and classifies relationships.

accepts.description: IPv4/IPv6 subnet calculator and CIDR analysis. Accepts a single CIDR or comma-separated CIDRs. Returns network/broadcast addresses, netmask, wildcard mask, usable host range, binary/hex masks, supernet, possible subnets. For multiple CIDRs, detects overlaps and classifies relationships.

resources.name: CDP Facilitator
resources.description: Best-in-class x402 facilitator. Fee-free USDC settlement on Base Mainnet. KYT/OFAC checks on every transaction.

resources.name: Corbits
resources.description: A production grade facilitator which supports multi-network, multi-token, multi-payment schemes.

resources.name: Mogami facilitator
resources.description: A free, developer-focused, production-ready facilitator for x402 payments. Use it instantly online, or launch your own Docker image in seconds.

resources.name: OpenX402.ai Facilitator
resources.description: The first permissionless, gasless and omnichain x402 facilitator that any x402 server can use without login

resources.name: PayAI Facilitator
resources.description: Accept x402 payments on all networks including Avalanche, Base, Polygon, Sei, Solana, and more! Get started in less than 1 minute. Supports all tokens. No API Keys required.

resources.name: Treasure Facilitator
resources.description: Treasure x402 Facilitator available on Base and Base Sepolia. Supports EIP-3009 compliant tokens including USDC, MAGIC, SMOL, MIO, AI Frens tokens, and more.

resources.name: WorldFun Facilitator
resources.description: AWE World.fun’s x402 Facilitator enables fee-free EIP-3009 payments in USDC and other ERC-20 tokens, handling verification and settlement on Base so developers don’t need blockchain infrastructure.

resources.name: x402.org Facilitator
resources.description: Default testnet facilitator for x402

resources.name: x402.rs Facilitator
resources.description: Independent, open-source facilitator in Rust. Easy to self-host, extend to new networks, or use via our hosted instance.
